channel.title: Hartree-Fock on OkongOyangO's Notes
channel.description: Recent content in Hartree-Fock on OkongOyangO's Notes

item.title: 😤Mean Field Approximation & Variational Method: Can Hartree, Fock, and BCS Be Mixed 1:1:1?
item.author: yzj5306@psu.edu (OkongOyangO)
item.description: This article aims to introduce the mean-field approximation while explaining its variational essence. Hartree, Fock, and BCS—these three mean-field approximations may seem like mutually incompatible decoupling schemes, but by recognizing the variational nature of the mean-field approximation, we find that they can indeed be mixed 1:1:1.
